name: dcaspt2-input-generator

metadata.name: dcaspt2-input-generator
metadata.summary: This is a GUI tool for supporting the generation of input files for DIRAC_CASPT2 calculation.

documentation:
# dcaspt2_input_generator

## Description

- This is a GUI tool for supporting the generation of input files for DIRAC_CASPT2 calculation.

## Prerequisites

- Python 3.7 or later
- pip

## Install

```bash
pip install -U dcaspt2_input_generator
```

## Usage

```bash
dcaspt2_input_generator
```
 or
```bash
python -m dcaspt2_input_generator
```

For more information, please see the [wiki](https://github.com/RQC-HU/dcaspt2_input_generator/wiki).

## LICENSE

- Apache LICENSE 2.0

## Author

- Kohei Noda

documentation: At the end of the input, the number is validated

classes.name: dcaspt2_input_generator.components.table_summary.TableSummary
documentation: TableSummary provides the layout for the input data

classes.name: dcaspt2_input_generator.components.data.TableIdxInfo
documentation:
This class stores the first and last indexes for inactive and secondary
to determine if the context menu (right-click menu) should be displayed.

methods.name: dcaspt2_input_generator.components.data.TableData.validate
documentation:
Check TableData values consistency.
In addition, decrease header_info.electron_number
by the number of electrons that are not included in the sum_dirac_dfcoef output.

Raises:
    KeyError: _description_
    KeyError: _description_

methods.name: dcaspt2_input_generator.components.menu_bar.AboutAction.__init__
documentation: クリックしたらバージョン情報などを表示する

classes.name: dcaspt2_input_generator.components.table_widget.TableWidget
documentation: TableWidget is the widget that displays the output data
It is a extended class of QTableWidget
1. Load the output data from the file "data.out"
3. Show the context menu when right click
4. Change the background color of the selected cells
5. Emit the color_changed signal when the background color is changed
Display the output data like the following:
irrep              no. of spinor    energy (a.u.)    percentage 1    AO type 1    percentage 2    AO type 2    ...

modules.name: dcaspt2_input_generator.utils.settings
documentation: This script contains all functions to handle settings of this application.
